rows.description: Recepta Anni presentis.
rows.notes: Based on gemini-flash description which precisely matches the image. Both extractors agree on row type and the absence of monetary amounts.

rows.description: Kidlington Augm. ad Test. Purificatis mi
rows.notes: Pounds amount visually verified as '35' (not '55') by direct comparison with the ledger image. gemini-flash's description 'Purificatis mi' is also more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Purificatio mi'. Shillings and pence agree.
rows.english_description: Augmentation (ecclesiastical supplement) from the Kidlington benefice payable at the Feast of the Purification.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation from the Kidlington benefice payable at the Feast of the Purification, amounting to £35 5s 0d.

rows.description: Capons & Brawn
rows.notes: gemini-flash's description 'Brawn' matches the image more accurately than gpt-5-mini's 'Brown'. All amounts are agreed upon.
rows.english_description: Receipt of capons and brawn (food donations or provisions received).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt of capons and brawn, amounting to £2 15s 0d.

rows.description: Sociis Commensalibus
rows.notes: gemini-flash's description 'Sociis Commensalibus' precisely matches the image. gpt-5-mini noted uncertainty in its reading, which was less accurate. Both agree on row type and absence of amounts.

rows.description: Cana Vesperialis q
rows.notes: gemini-flash's description, including the trailing 'q' which is clearly visible before the amount column, is more accurate. Its note explicitly highlights this detail. All amounts are agreed upon.
rows.english_description: Charge or receipt relating to the fellows' evening meal (commensal fellows' vesperal dinner).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Charge or receipt relating to the fellows' evening meal, amounting to £8 0s 0d.

rows.description: mn Crewe, Fowell, Wells, Pyne
rows.notes: Visually verified that there are no monetary amounts on this line; it is purely a descriptive continuation of the previous entry. gpt-5-mini correctly identified no amounts, while gemini-flash incorrectly assigned the previous row's amount. gemini-flash's description 'mn Crewe, Fowell' is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'min Crowe, Towell'.
rows.english_description: Names of commensal fellows recorded: Crewe, Fowell, Wells, and Pyne.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt recorded for Crewe; Fowell; Wells; Pyne (no amount listed).

rows.description: Bibliotheca
rows.notes: Consensus between both extractors for all fields.

rows.description: A Mrs Coperat ad Test. I.J.B. 1746
rows.notes: gemini-flash's description ('Mrs Coperat', 'I.J.B.') is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's ('mro Coporat', 'D.J.B.'). All amounts are agreed upon.
rows.english_description: Donation to the library from Mrs Coperat recorded in 1746.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Donation to the library from Mrs Coperat recorded 1746, amounting to £2 2s 6d.

rows.description: A Mrs Coperat ad Test. I.J.B. 1747.
rows.notes: gemini-flash's description ('Mrs Coperat', 'I.J.B.', and the trailing period) is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's. All amounts are agreed upon.
rows.english_description: Donation to the library from Mrs Coperat recorded in 1747.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Donation to the library from Mrs Coperat recorded 1747, amounting to £3 0s 0d.

rows.description: A Mrs Bray ad Test. Nat. 1747. Trige
rows.notes: gemini-flash's description, including 'Mrs' and 'Trige', is more accurate and complete, matching the image. All amounts are agreed upon.
rows.english_description: Donation to the library from Mrs Bray recorded at Christmas 1747.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Donation to the library from Mrs Bray recorded at Christmas 1747, amounting to £0 10s 0d.

rows.description: A Mrs Fortesque Det. fees in part
rows.notes: gemini-flash's description ('Mrs Fortesque') is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's ('mro Fortisque'). All amounts are agreed upon.
rows.english_description: Partial payment of library fees from Mrs Fortesque (part of fees received).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Partial payment of library fees from Mrs Fortesque, amounting to £9 10s 0d.

rows.description: Recepta Varia.
rows.notes: Consensus between both extractors for all fields.

rows.description: Dec. 19 from Ladlane on Acct of y. Jessey & Guernsey. F
rows.notes: gemini-flash's description ('Ladlane', 'Acct', 'y.', 'Jessey', and trailing 'F') is more accurate and complete, matching the image. gpt-5-mini noted ambiguity. All amounts are agreed upon.
rows.english_description: Receipt from Ladlane on account of the Jessey and Guernsey matters.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from Ladlane on account of the Jessey and Guernsey matters, amounting to £6 16s 8d.

rows.description: Feb. 12 from mr Millar 1. year's Inter. of £300 3. p Ct
rows.notes: gemini-flash's description (specifically '£300' and 'p Ct') is more accurate, matching the image. gpt-5-mini misread '£300' as '£900'. All amounts are agreed upon.
rows.english_description: One year's interest on a £300 capital received from Mr Millar (at 3 percent).
rows.english_description_with_amount: One year's interest on £300 received from Mr Millar, amounting to £27 0s 0d.

rows.description: from y. Exchequer one years Ann. to xm. 1747
rows.notes: gemini-flash's description ('y. Exchequer') is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's ('ye Exchequer'). All amounts are agreed upon.
rows.english_description: Annuity payment from the Exchequer covering to Christmas 1747 (one year's annuity).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annuity payment from the Exchequer for the year to Christmas 1747, amounting to £50 0s 0d.

rows.description: 20 from mr Bendysh for mrs Thiers Augm. & yf
rows.notes: gemini-flash's description ('mr Bendysh', 'mrs Thiers Augm. & yf') is significantly more accurate and matches the image well. gpt-5-mini noted high uncertainty and had several misreadings ('Mr Bendish', 'Mrs Huie's Augm't'). All amounts are agreed upon.
rows.english_description: Receipt from Mr Bendysh relating to the augmentation for Mrs Thiers.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from Mr Bendysh relating to the augmentation for Mrs Thiers, amounting to £100 0s 0d.

rows.description: Apr. 13 by Bill Drawn on mr Bendysh on acc of qo
rows.notes: gemini-flash's description (date 'Apr. 13', 'mr Bendysh', 'acc of qo') is highly accurate, matching the image. gpt-5-mini misread the date ('1748 Apr 19'), gender ('Mrs'), and final abbreviation ('J??'), and incorrectly included '1748' which is a margin note for the previous year. gemini-flash's note regarding 'qo' is also more insightful. Amounts agree.
rows.english_description: Amount received by bill drawn on Mr Bendysh on account (unspecified further detail).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Amount received by bill drawn on Mr Bendysh on account, amounting to £100 0s 0d.

rows.description: June 13 from Medenham on acc of Jessey fine
rows.notes: gemini-flash's description ('Medenham', 'Jessey') is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's ('Madenham', 'Jersey'). All amounts are agreed upon.
rows.english_description: Receipt from Medenham on account relating to the Jessey fine.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from Medenham on account of the Jessey fine, amounting to £6 13s 4d.

rows.description: from an Error in y. Glarier's Bill.
rows.notes: gemini-flash's description ('y. Glarier's Bill.') is more accurate (including 'y.' and 'Glarier' vs 'ye Glazier') and complete (period) than gpt-5-mini's. All amounts are agreed upon.
rows.english_description: Small corrective receipt arising from an error in Glarier's bill.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Corrective receipt arising from an error in Glarier's bill, amounting to £0 2s 1d.

rows.description: Oct. 25 from mr Churchill y. Ball. of y. Ls Tab. Accd pd
rows.notes: gemini-flash correctly parsed this as a distinct line with an amount. gpt-5-mini incorrectly combined this line with the following descriptive continuation. The description itself is also more accurate in gemini-flash ('y. Ls Tab. Accd pd' vs 'of ye sj. Tab. acct pd'). Amounts agree.
rows.english_description: Receipt from Mr Churchill (associated with Balliol) relating to the table account.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from Mr Churchill relating to the table account, amounting to £0 13s 0d.

rows.description: by y. Rector last year & now recd by y. Table
rows.notes: This row was correctly identified as a separate descriptive line with no associated monetary amount by gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini failed to extract this as a distinct row, instead combining it with the previous entry's description. Visually verified as a distinct line.
rows.english_description: Note that an amount recorded by the Rector last year has now been received by the college table.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Amount previously recorded by the Rector last year now received by the table (no amount listed).

rows.notes: gpt-5-mini correctly identified that this subtotal line has no descriptive text in the description column, only amounts. gemini-flash incorrectly transcribed the amounts into the description. The amounts and half-penny fraction are agreed and visually clear.

gpt-5-mini correctly identified that this subtotal line has no descriptive text. gemini-flash incorrectly transcribed the amounts into the description. The amounts are agreed, but gpt-5-mini missed the visually clear '1/4' fraction, which gemini-flash correctly extracted. Combined the best aspects of both.

rows.description: Summa Omn. Receptorum
rows.notes: gpt-5-mini's description 'Summa Omn. Receptorum' is more accurate than gemini-flash's 'Receptorun'. All amounts and the half-penny fraction are agreed upon and visually clear. gpt-5-mini's note also provides valuable arithmetic verification for the fractions across the totals.
